description: A clean, flat-design landscape PSA/tip graphic in USCIS house style on a white background. Top left carries the official seal and stacked wordmark 'U.S. Citizenship and Immigration Services' (with the DHS seal). The left two-thirds is a bold red sans-serif headline reading 'When mailing a form, do not send an original document unless filing instructions specifically ask for it.' On the right is a large flat navy-blue vector illustration of a residential mailbox on a post with its red flag raised. Across the bottom runs a full-width navy banner with white bold text: 'For more information visit uscis.gov/forms.' This is a designed informational/process-tip graphic (vector illustration plus typography, not a photo), instructing applicants on correct filing practice and warning that unrequested originals may be destroyed. Audience is immigration-benefit applicants; intent is procedural guidance / customer service, not political propaganda. From Dec 2022 (Biden-era), included as part of the agency-graphics catalog.
notable_text: When mailing a form, do not send an original document unless filing instructions specifically ask for it. / For more information visit uscis.gov/forms. / U.S. Citizenship and Immigration Services
